name: Washi Light S
careInstructions: Feather dust only. Do not use wet cloth or touch with wet hands. Keep away from moisture. Paper shade is delicate — handle with care.
flashcardNotes: Washi paper made in Gifu, Japan. E27 bulb. Table version comes with complimentary converter plug. No returns or exchanges. Care: feather dust only.

name: Washi Light M
careInstructions: Feather dust only. Do not use wet cloth or touch with wet hands. Keep away from moisture. Paper shade is delicate — handle with care.
flashcardNotes: Washi paper made in Gifu, Japan. E27 bulb. Table version includes complimentary converter plug. No returns or exchanges. Care: feather dust only.

name: Fores RIN
careInstructions: Feather dust only. Battery operated — use standard AA batteries. Do not use rechargeable batteries. Keep away from moisture.
flashcardNotes: Hand-held battery operated washi light. RIN series. Bamboo handle. Show customer the light works — pop in store battery during sale. No returns or exchanges.

name: Sugy Clock
careInstructions: Wipe with dry cloth only. Avoid moisture. Use cheap standard batteries only — rechargeable batteries may damage the clock mechanism. No second hand — check working condition by watching gears shift at the back.
flashcardNotes: No second hand — tell if working by watching gears at the back. Advise cheap standard batteries only — rechargeable can ruin the mechanics. Remove plastic film for demo, put back before packing.

name: Kungyokudo Incense
careInstructions: Store in a cool, dry place away from direct sunlight. Keep away from moisture and strong odours. Use in a well-ventilated space.
flashcardNotes: Traditional Kyoto incense house — one of the oldest in Japan. We burn it daily in store. Available as full box or sampler (5 sticks per scent). Sampler uses the 'sampler' variant at checkout.

name: Wall Table B5
careInstructions: Wipe with dry or slightly damp cloth. Avoid prolonged contact with moisture. Do not place hot items directly on surface. Apply furniture oil every 6–12 months.
flashcardNotes: Restockable evergreen item. Currently on preorder — give a vague arrival estimate (e.g. 'next month') and mention possible shipping delays. Available in Natural and Smoked Oak.

name: Teak Arm Chair
careInstructions: Wipe teak frame with dry cloth. For fabric: spot clean with mild detergent and damp cloth. Allow to dry fully. Apply teak oil to the frame annually if desired.

name: Yaki Ikebana Vase
dimensions: Ø18 × H22 cm / Mouth Ø6 cm
careInstructions: Hand wash only with mild soap — do not put in dishwasher. Natural ash glaze may have slight variations — this is characteristic of the piece. Dry thoroughly before storing.

name: Teak Sideboard
careInstructions: Wipe with dry or slightly damp cloth. Avoid prolonged moisture contact. Apply furniture oil or wax every 6–12 months. Do not place in direct sunlight for extended periods.

name: Arc Floor Lamp
careInstructions: Wipe steel frame with dry cloth. Feather dust the washi shade only — no wet cloth. Comes with complimentary converter plug. E27 bulb.

name: Antique Step Stool
careInstructions: Wipe with dry cloth. Hinoki (Japanese cypress) has a natural fragrance that fades over time. Avoid prolonged moisture contact. May be lightly sanded and oiled if surface dulls.

name: Stainless Steel Tray (L)
careInstructions: Hand wash with mild soap and dry immediately to prevent water spots. Do not use abrasive scrubbers — they will scratch the brushed finish. Avoid prolonged contact with acidic substances.
flashcardNotes: Available in S, M, and L. Brushed stainless steel — advise against abrasive cleaning. Japanese craftsmanship, simple and durable.
